strengths: Demonstrated proper needle loading and driving technique through the Penrose drain

Maintained good instrument control and suture management throughout the procedure
weaknesses: Failed to complete the task by cutting both suture ends inside the trainer

May have rushed through final steps without ensuring complete task requirements

drills.name: Complete Task Sequence Drill
drills.description: Practice the full task from needle loading through final suture cutting, emphasizing completion verification before stopping
drills.targets_weakness: Failed to complete the task by cutting both suture ends inside the trainer

drills.name: Task Closure Checklist Practice
drills.description: After tying knots, deliberately pause to verify knot security, then cut both tails inside the trainer while maintaining visualization
drills.targets_weakness: Did not achieve proper task closure despite executing technical steps correctly

progression_note: Your technical skills for needle driving and knot tying are solid, but task completion requires cutting both suture ends inside the trainer. Focus on following through with all task requirements rather than stopping after knot completion.
